metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_1827
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.9 PTPδ induces postsynaptic differentiation through IL-1RAcPb (shown with PTPδA3-ECD-Fc beads on neurons of wild-type (Il1rap+/+) and IL-1RAcP knock-out (Il1rap-/-) mice)

3/11/2017 Pim
- The role of IL-1RAcPb is studied via a Il1rap KO animal and rescue with overexpression of IL-1RAcP or IL-1RAcPb. Only IL-1RAcPb was able to rescue the phenotype of defective postsynaptic differentiation.. Experimental description: - Cells are of mouse species: "Cell cultures, transfection, and coculture assay. Primary cortical cultures were prepared from mice at postnatal day 0 (P0) essentially as described previously"
